judge_reason: The two descriptions disagree on the specific verbatim text of the stamps: Description A describes 'Multiple date stamps in blue/black ink' without quoting text, while Description B quotes four specific, distinct stamp texts (e.g., 'RECEIVED FBI COMMUNICATIONS AUG 9 7 48 PM '52'), which cannot be verified against Description A's general claim, creating a contradiction in quoted visual text.
original_image_tags: Aged, pinkish-tan paper sheet with two hole-punch tears at the top edge. Multiple date stamps in blue/black ink are visible across the page, indicating routing through various FBI and Department of Justice divisions in August 1952. Faint, reversed text is visible through the paper, indicating this is the reverse side of a typed document.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned manila document folder cover with three punched holes at the top and multiple faded rubber-stamp markings, including “RECEIVED FBI COMMUNICATIONS AUG 9 7 48 PM ’52,” “REC’D BELMONT B.I. AUG 9 8 39 PM ’52,” and partial Department of Justice/Justice markings.*
